name: VitaNova Life Sciences Corp
summary: Yijia Group Corp. (operating as VitaNova Life Sciences Corp) is a Nevada corporation providing two business segments: consulting advisory services in management, accounting, and finance; and healthcare products and services through its wholly owned subsidiary Nutripeak Trading Corporation. Core healthcare products are anti-aging supplements that boost NAD+ levels to promote anti-aging, energy metabolism, cognitive function, and cellular repair, complemented by personalized health consultation and nutrition planning services.

products.name: NAD+ Anti-Aging Products
products.description: Supplements that increase NAD+ levels to promote anti-aging, enhance energy metabolism, improve cognitive function, and strengthen cellular repair.

products.name: Health Consultation Services
products.description: Personalized health advice, supplement recommendations, and customized nutrition and wellness plans based on individual customer needs.

products.name: Consulting Advisory Services
products.description: Management business, accounting, and finance consulting services for domestic and international clients.
